summary: Attempted the requested read-only Playwright verification against http://127.0.0.1:7777, but browser launch failed before any route or DOM assertions could run. No app console output was captured because no page session opened.
steps: playwright-cli open http://127.0.0.1:7777 with writable Playwright daemon/cache overrides after initial local cache permission issues

failures.where: Playwright browser launch before route verification
failures.expected: A browser session should open so the app routes and UI assertions can be checked read-only.
failures.actual: Playwright could not launch Chromium/Chrome in this environment. Launch aborted with a browser crash including `bootstrap_check_in ... MachPortRendezvousServer ... Permission denied (1100)`, so `/`, `/compose`, `/quarters`, `/vault`, `/connectors`, `/coordination`, and `/settings` could not be verified.
